failure_movement.justification: Passrate prediction [0.70-0.73] confirmed (actual 0.71). Empty cluster=0 correctly predicted. Both specific 'redundant-cluster-crowding' tasks (0bc8ad93, 10d9b85a) remain failed—claimed 2-4 task shrink did not materialize. Pure retrieval-miss tasks (129d1232, 0edc2aef, 157a136e) correctly predicted to remain failed. No prior-iter cluster baseline makes magnitude verification impossible.

trace_movement.justification: MMR claimed to reduce 5+ same-timestamp docs in top-8; data shows 77/100 tasks still have 5+ same-date docs in top-8, avg max=6.19—no detectable diversity improvement. The 2048 token budget expansion is confirmed: 2 tasks exceeded old 1536 ceiling. 'Newly-passed tasks show greater date-turn diversity' is unverifiable without per-task comparison baseline.

side_effects.justification: Token jump >200 falsification criterion held (only +few tokens per task over ceiling). Empty-output tail correctly predicted to reach 0. Predicted minimal regression risk among stable passes appears to hold (no obvious stable-pass regressions visible). However, failure to reduce timestamp redundancy (core MMR mechanism) is a notable undetected risk.
